entry_sources.governance_events_export: schema keel.governance_events/v1 is converted into bundle v2 entries with chain_format_version defaulting to v1, created_at from occurred_at or created_at, payload_json from payload when absent, and chain_scope from project_id when absent
entry_sources.payload_decoding: gzip decompress only if export bytes start with magic bytes 1f8b; JSON document parse first, JSONL fallback skips blank lines and requires each nonblank line to be a JSON object

walk_rules.group_by: entry.chain_scope, preserving None as a scope
walk_rules.array_order_check: within each original bundle-level or per-record chain_entries array, if two adjacent entries both have sequence_number and current < previous, fail WALK_SEQUENCE_INVERSION
walk_rules.duplicate_sequence_check: within each chain_scope, duplicate non-null sequence_number fails WALK_SEQUENCE_INVERSION
walk_rules.sort_for_walk: sort entries per scope by (sequence_number is None, sequence_number or 0)
walk_rules.first_entry_prev_hash: not verified against chain state outside the supplied bundle window
walk_rules.subsequent_prev_hash: must equal immediately previous walked entry record_hash
walk_rules.subsequent_sequence: must be strictly greater than previous walked sequence_number
